prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity. No coordinates, contacts, AlphaFold-style models, or post-seal validation annotations are allowed.

RCSB title: S305I Frontotemporal Lobar Degeneration (FTLD) type II tau filament. Entity description: Microtubule-associated protein tau. Organism: Homo sapiens. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.
